provenance.note: Floor set by hand, NOT yet seeded from real hardware: a workflow cannot be dispatched until it is on the default branch, so the first real run happens after this merges. 20 tok/s is far below what Qwen3-0.6B does on a v5litepod-8; it is sized to catch a collapse (CPU fallback, a recompile every step), not to track drift. Re-record it from the first green nightly with `probe.py --record` and commit the result.
